title: World Bank Global Financial Development Database (GFDD) — comparator countries, banking-depth and insurance-premium indicators

files.name: GFDD_DI_01.json
files.indicator_label: Private credit by deposit money banks to GDP (%)

files.name: GFDD_DI_04.json
files.indicator_label: Deposit money bank assets to deposit money bank assets and central bank assets (%)

files.name: GFDD_DI_09.json
files.indicator_label: Life insurance premium volume to GDP (%)

files.name: GFDD_DI_10.json
files.indicator_label: Non-life insurance premium volume to GDP (%)

time_coverage: 1960-2021 (varies by indicator and country; see coverage notes below)
units: percent (all seven indicators are GDP or asset-share ratios; see indicator_label per file)
notes: Pulled directly from the World Bank's standard countries/indicators REST API (api.worldbank.org/v2), the SAME API family used for the project's existing WDI harmonization, but querying the GFDD database (distinct from WDI proper -- confirmed GFDD.* codes are not in WDICSV.csv). This complements data/raw/worldbank-gfdd/iran-banking-sector-depth-1960-2016/ (pulled 2026-07-13 via FRED mirror, IRN-only) by adding the SAME four banking-depth indicators (GFDD.DI.01, DI.04, OI.02, SI.04) for the 10 fixed comparator countries (TUR, SAU, IRQ, VEN, ARG, RUS, USA, KOR, ESP, ITA) plus IRN pulled fresh here for a consistent single-vintage cross-check, PLUS three new indicators not previously pulled at all: GFDD.DI.09 (life insurance premium volume, % GDP), GFDD.DI.10 (non-life insurance premium volume, % GDP), GFDD.DI.11 (insurance company assets, % GDP) -- these directly answer the brief's 'insurance-sector: total premiums written (life and non-life), as a level and as % of GDP' requirement using a genuine multi-country, methodologically consistent source (World Bank republishes underlying Axco/Swiss-Re-sourced premium data standardized to GDP ratios). Coverage gaps (real, not download failures): IRQ has zero data for DI.09/DI.10/DI.11 (World Bank does not carry Iraqi insurance-sector data in GFDD); SAU has zero data for DI.04. GFDD Iran coverage generally stops 2016-2018 depending on indicator (source discontinued Iran updates). All values are unmodified World-Bank-computed ratios, no interpolation or estimation performed.

failures.reason: World Bank GFDD carries no observations at all for this indicator/country pair (queried 1960-2025, zero non-null values) -- genuine source gap, not a request failure.
World Bank GFDD carries no insurance-sector observations for Iraq at all -- genuine source gap.
